calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust And Conserving Internal Affairs Of Trust,
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Edwrd Koplowitz for Darren Tong. Jack Bonanno appearing for Lorraine Yick and Donna Yick. Case is settled after mediation. Counsel will file exparte petition to approve settlement agreement with everyone's waiver of notice. Both petitions are taken off calendar.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Petn. To Remove Trustee And Successor Trustee; To Appt. Successor Trustee; For An Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; Damages For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, For Conversion; For Restoration Of Property; For Double Damages For Bad Faith Taking; For Constructive Fraud; And For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Existence Of Trust And Conserving Internal Affairs Of Trust,
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Continued To May-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno (Counsel for Lorraine Yick, Trustee, and Donna Yick, Respondent); Edward Koplowitz (Counsel for Darren Tong, Petitioner); Lorraine Yick (Trustee); Donna Yick (Respondent).

The Court initially raised the issue of untimely notice of the hearing by Mr. Koplowitz whereupon Mr. Bonanno agreed to waive notice. After further discussion of the posture of the case, the Court determined that there should be no distributions from at this time and that there would be change in the administration of the trust as well. Upon agreement of counsel, the matter was referred to pro bono mediation (by Minute Order signed in open court). Counsel also agreed to abate discovery pending mediation. The Court further ordered that mediation be completed on or before April 25, 2007 and continued both Petitions to May 2, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for status.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Teresa Fox; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
